summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DEEPOTUS Phase 8 features: 2FA TOTP, activity heatmap, full whitelist export, email events page, and cooldown blacklist functionality. All 5 new features are working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Recharts showing width/height warnings in console for chart components

passed_tests: 2FA Status API - returns correct structure with enabled/setup_pending/backup_codes_remaining
2FA Setup API - generates secret, otpauth_uri, QR code base64, and 10 backup codes
2FA Verify API - accepts valid TOTP codes and enables 2FA
2FA Login Flow - password-only login correctly rejected when 2FA enabled, password+TOTP succeeds
2FA Backup Code Login - backup codes work for authentication
2FA Disable API - requires password and valid code to disable
Activity Heatmap API - returns 7x24 grid with integer values >= 0 in public stats
Full Whitelist Export API - returns CSV with proper headers and Content-Disposition attachment
Email Events API - supports pagination, type filtering, and recipient filtering
Cooldown Blacklist API - supports cooldown_days parameter in manual add and bulk import
Cooldown Registration Block - emails with active cooldown correctly blocked from registration
Frontend 2FA UI - Enable 2FA button opens setup dialog with QR code, backup codes, and verify input
Frontend Activity Heatmap - 7x24 grid properly rendered on /stats page
Frontend Full Export - Export ALL button shows count and is functional
Frontend Email Events Page - /admin/emails loads with type chips, recipient filter, table, and pagination
Frontend Cooldown UI - cooldown days inputs present in both manual add and CSV import forms
Frontend Cooldown Display - blacklist table shows cooldown information with 'unlocks DATE' and 'permanent' badges

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Phase 8 features fully functional, minor chart rendering warnings)
